# JT Consulting - Site Information for AI Models

## Site Overview

- **URL**: https://jtconsulting.com.co
- **Name**: JT Consulting
- **Description**: Servicios contables y financieros para pequeñas empresas en EE.UU. y Colombia
- **Type**: Single-page business website
- **Languages**: Spanish (ES) - default, English (EN)
- **Author**: JT Consulting
- **Contact Phone**: +57 300 6221079
- **Tagline**: "Claridad Financiera para tu Negocio" | "Finanzas sólidas para negocios que crecen"

## Navigation Structure

### Main Navigation
- **Servicios** → Section `#servicios`
- **Contáctame** → Section `#contacto` (footer)

### Language Toggle
- ES/EN toggle button in header (desktop and mobile)
- Language preference stored in JavaScript variable

## Page Sections

### 1. Header/Navbar
- Sticky navigation bar
- Logo: `jt-consulting-logo.jpeg` (with `rounded-lg` corners)
- WhatsApp contact button
- Mobile hamburger menu

### 2. Hero Section
- **Badge**: SERVICIOS CONTABLES Y FINANCIEROS / ACCOUNTING & FINANCIAL SERVICES
- **Title**: CLARIDAD FINANCIERA PARA TU NEGOCIO / FINANCIAL CLARITY FOR YOUR BUSINESS
- **Subtitle**: Help organizing finances, understanding numbers, making better decisions
- **Stats Panel**:
  - 10+ AÑOS DE EXPERIENCIA / 10+ YEARS OF EXPERIENCE
  - EXPERIENCIA EN EE.UU. Y COLOMBIA / US & COLOMBIA EXPERIENCE
  - ENFOCADA EN RESULTADOS / FOCUSED ON RESULTS
- **Card**: "MÁS QUE CONTABILIDAD — Transformo tus datos financieros en herramienta para tomar mejores decisiones y crecer"
- **CTA**: ¡TRABAJEMOS JUNTOS! / LET'S WORK TOGETHER!
- **Image** (dynamic based on language):
  - **ES**: `02-claridad-finaciera.jpeg` (Mujer profesional trabajando en finanzas)
  - **EN**: `01-financial-clarity.jpeg` (Professional woman working on finances)

### 3. Services Section (`#servicios`)
- **Background**: `03-financial-clarity-business.jpeg` with overlay
- **Callout**: "Transformando datos financieros en crecimiento y mejores decisiones"

#### Services (5 total):
1. **CONTABILIDAD Y CONCILIACIONES** - Registros precisos y actualizados / Accurate and up-to-date records
2. **INFORMES FINANCIEROS** - Estado de Resultados, Balance General, Flujo de Caja / Income Statement, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow
3. **PRESUPUESTOS Y CONTROL DE COSTOS** - Planifica, monitorea y optimiza tus recursos / Plan, monitor, and optimize your resources
4. **ANÁLISIS FINANCIERO** - Información clara para tomar mejores decisiones / Clear insights for better business decisions
5. **APOYO PARA EMPRESAS EN EE.UU. Y COLOMBIA** - Experiencia trabajando con empresas en ambos mercados / Experience working with companies in both markets

### 4. Trust Section
- **CONFIABLE** - Confidencialidad y profesionalismo / Confidentiality and professionalism
- **ENTREGA PUNTUAL** - Compromiso y eficiencia / Commitment and efficiency
- **COMUNICACIÓN CLARA** - Te mantengo informado en cada paso / I keep you informed every step of the way
- **CTA**: ¡TRABAJEMOS JUNTOS! button

### 5. Footer (`#contacto`)
- Logo: `jt-consulting-logo.jpeg` (with `rounded-lg` corners)
- Tagline: "Finanzas sólidas para negocios que crecen"
- WhatsApp contact link: +57 300 6221079
- Copyright: © 2025 JT Consulting. Todos los derechos reservados.

## Assets/Images

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `jt-consulting-logo.jpeg` | Company logo (used in navbar and footer with rounded corners) |
| `01-financial-clarity.jpeg` | Hero image for English version (professional woman working on finances) |
| `02-claridad-finaciera.jpeg` | Hero image for Spanish version (woman working on finances) |
| `03-financial-clarity-business.jpeg` | Services section background |
| `favicon.png` | Favicon |

## Technologies Used

- **HTML5**: Semantic structure
- **Tailwind CSS**: Via CDN (`@tailwindcss/browser@4`)
- **Google Fonts**: Inter font family
- **JavaScript**: Vanilla JS for interactivity
- **No frameworks**: Pure HTML/CSS/JS

## Key Features

- Responsive design (mobile-first approach)
- Bilingual support (ES/EN toggle) with dynamic hero image
- WhatsApp floating button with pulse animation
- Smooth scroll navigation
- Mobile responsive menu
- Schema.org LocalBusiness JSON-LD

## SEO Metadata

### Meta Tags
```
Title: JT Consulting | Claridad Financiera para tu Negocio
Description (ES): Servicios contables y financieros para pequeñas empresas en EE.UU. y Colombia. Contabilidad, conciliaciones, informes financieros y análisis empresarial.
Description (EN): Accounting and financial services for small businesses in the U.S. and Colombia. Bookkeeping, reconciliations, financial reports and business analysis.
Keywords: accounting, bookkeeping, financial consulting, Colombia, US, small business, contabilidad, finanzas, conciliaciones, servicios contables, informes financieros, análisis financiero
Robots: index, follow
Canonical: https://jtconsulting.com.co
```

### Open Graph
```
og:title: JT Consulting | Claridad Financiera para tu Negocio
og:description: Servicios contables y financieros para pequeñas empresas en EE.UU. y Colombia. Te ayudo a organizar tus finanzas y tomar mejores decisiones.
og:image: 03-financial-clarity-business.jpeg
og:type: website
og:url: https://jtconsulting.com.co
```

### Twitter Cards
```
twitter:card: summary_large_image
twitter:title: JT Consulting | Claridad Financiera para tu Negocio
twitter:description: Servicios contables y financieros para pequeñas empresas en EE.UU. y Colombia.
twitter:image: 03-financial-clarity-business.jpeg
```

### Schema.org JSON-LD
```json
{
  "@type": "LocalBusiness",
  "name": "JT Consulting",
  "description": "Servicios contables y financieros para pequeñas empresas en EE.UU. y Colombia",
  "telephone": "+573006221079",
  "address": { "@type": "PostalAddress", "addressCountry": "CO" },
  "url": "https://jtconsulting.com.co"
}
```

## Contact Information

- **WhatsApp**: https://wa.me/573006221079
- **Phone**: +57 300 6221079
- **Website**: https://jtconsulting.com.co

## Target Audience

Small business owners in:
- **United States (EE.UU.)**
- **Colombia**

Industries served:
- Small businesses requiring accounting services
- Companies needing financial analysis and reporting
- Businesses seeking budget and cost control
- Enterprises requiring bilingual (ES/EN) financial support

## Color Scheme

| Color | Hex | Usage |
|-------|-----|-------|
| Primary Dark | `#0D2137` | Navbar, headers, backgrounds |
| Primary Green | `#2D8653` | CTAs, buttons |
| Accent Gold | `#C9A84C` | Highlights, icons |
| Dark Green | `#1B4332` | Services section background |
| White | `#FFFFFF` | Text on dark, backgrounds |
| Gray | `#F5F5F5`, `#Gray-50` | Secondary backgrounds |
| WhatsApp Green | `#25D366` | Floating WhatsApp button |

## Content Categories

### Services (en)
1. Bookkeeping & Reconciliations
2. Financial Reports (Income Statement, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow)
3. Budgeting & Cost Control
4. Financial Analysis
5. Support for Businesses in the U.S. & Colombia

### Services (es)
1. Contabilidad y Conciliaciones
2. Informes Financieros (Estado de Resultados, Balance General, Flujo de Caja)
3. Presupuestos y Control de Costos
4. Análisis Financiero
5. Apoyo para Empresas en EE.UU. y Colombia

## Translation Keys

The site uses a `data-i18n` attribute system with the following keys:
```
current_lang, nav_services, nav_contact, nav_cta,
hero_badge, hero_h1, hero_subtitle, hero_circle_text,
hero_stat_1, hero_stat_2, hero_stat_3, hero_card, hero_cta,
services_callout,
service_1_title, service_1_desc,
service_2_title, service_2_desc,
service_3_title, service_3_desc,
service_4_title, service_4_desc,
service_5_title, service_5_desc,
services_cta,
trust_1_title, trust_1_desc,
trust_2_title, trust_2_desc,
trust_3_title, trust_3_desc,
trust_cta,
footer_tagline, footer_copyright
```

## External Links

- **WhatsApp**: https://wa.me/573006221079
- **Google Fonts**: https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap
- **Tailwind CDN**: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@tailwindcss/browser@4

## Important Notes

- Single-page application with anchor navigation
- JavaScript handles language switching without page reload
- Hero image changes dynamically based on language (ES: 02-claridad-finaciera.jpeg, EN: 01-financial-clarity.jpeg)
- All text is bilingual (Spanish/English)
- WhatsApp is primary contact method
- Site optimized for mobile and desktop viewing
- No forms or email - contact via WhatsApp only

---

*This file is designed to help AI models understand and navigate this website effectively.*
